'''Industrial Complexes''' were [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] that were used for different industrial needs. Industrial Complexes were manufactured by [[VenteX Construction Yards/Legends|VenteX Construction Yards]]. They required a crew with at least 1,143 members.

{{Station-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
